Title: Directs the chair of the board of trustees of the city university of New York shall conduct an audit of such university's participation in retirement systems
Summary: Directs the chair of the board of trustees of the city university of New York shall conduct an audit of such university's participation in retirement systems and issue a report thereon.
ActClause: AN ACT directing the chair of the board of trustees of the city university of New York shall conduct an audit of such university's participation in retirement systems
